name: Williamsburg Chicken, as Served at London Town Publik Hou
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil a 10-inch X 13-inch pan.
2. Soften the gelatin in a small amount of cold water or chicken broth.
3. Place over low heat and stir until it dissolves.
4. Stir in lemon juice, salt, pepper, and thyme into the mixture.
5. Mix well with the broth and mayonnaise.
6. Add all other ingredients (except grapes) to the pan and pour into prepared baking dish.
7. Refrigerate overnight or for several hours until set.
8. Decorate with halved green grapes and serve over salad greens.
